executives.name: Ian Edwards
executives.background: Ian L. Edwards was appointed President and Chief Executive Officer of AtkinsRéalis in October 2019. He joined the company in 2014 and has over 30 years of experience in the global engineering and construction industry.

tenure_dates.title: Managing Director, Leighton Asia, India and Offshore
